Who's Who in abc Conjecture Research
Home Top 100 North America Europe Asia & Pacific In Memoriam Genealogy Reading List Data Methodology About Corrections

About

Why this site exists

The community working on the abc conjecture is small enough to enumerate and large enough to be hard to know completely. This site is a starting point for anyone wanting to know who is working on it today, where they are, and what they have been writing recently.

Who built it

Steve Hubbard built this as part of the Who's Who in [Conjecture] Research project. The pipeline is open and the methodology is documented. Suggestions, corrections, and additions are welcome.

Contact

Questions, corrections, or additions: admin@wwiabc.org.

License and reuse

The data on this site is built from public sources (arXiv, OpenAlex, zbMATH, MGP) under their respective license terms. The compiled list and methodology are released under CC-BY 4.0: feel free to reuse with attribution.

Maintained by Steve Hubbard (admin@wwiabc.org). Data sources: arXiv, OpenAlex, zbMATH Open, Mathematics Genealogy Project.

Last built June 2026.
